overview: Classify saved bookmarks by domain, site purpose, usage, business category, and learning theme, then organize them into bookmark folders with editable rules and reclassification support.
problem: Bookmark collections become hard to search and maintain, and existing bookmark tools do not make practical multi-axis reorganization easy.
similar: Raindrop.io, Toby, OneTab, Workona, Chrome bookmark manager, bookmark managers
diff: Targets bookmarks directly, supports multi-axis classification beyond domains, and applies results to bookmark folders with user-adjustable rules.
